metadata.name: Extort drains three opponents in four-player game
metadata.description: P1 controls Syndic of Tithes on the battlefield. P1 casts Harmonize ({2GG}). The Extort triggered ability (CR 702.101a) fires immediately — it goes onto the stack above Harmonize (LIFO, CR 405.5). When it resolves, the engine's deterministic always-pay fallback executes the drain: each of the three opponents (P2, P3, P4) loses 1 life (40->39) and P1 gains 3 life (equal to the total life lost, 40->43). Harmonize then resolves: P1 draws 3 cards. Final assertions: P1 at 43, P2/P3/P4 each at 39.
metadata.generation_notes: CR 702.101a: Extort is a triggered ability — 'Whenever you cast a spell, you may pay {W/B}. If you do, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain life equal to the total life lost this way.' In deterministic (non-interactive) mode the engine always resolves the drain effect (always-pay fallback, no {W/B} optional cost prompt). Syndic of Tithes card definition: cid('syndic-of-tithes'), {1}{W}, 2/2 Human Cleric, AbilityDefinition::Keyword(KeywordAbility::Extort). The trigger event is TriggerEvent::ControllerCastsSpell, verified in rules/abilities.rs. builder.rs generates TriggeredAbilityDef from KeywordAbility::Extort at object construction. Harmonize {2GG} draws 3 cards with no life change, so it cleanly isolates the extort life-gain/loss math. P1 library has 3 cards to satisfy the draw-3 effect. Sequence: (1) P1 casts Harmonize — stack has 1 item; (2) Extort trigger fires — stack has 2 items (Harmonize bottom, trigger top); (3) all 4 players pass — trigger resolves: P2/P3/P4 each -1 life (39 each), P1 +3 life (43); (4) all 4 players pass — Harmonize resolves: P1 draws 3 (hand 0->3). In 4-player Commander each player starts at 40 life. life-gain = total life actually lost = 3 * 1 = 3. Final: P1=43, P2=P3=P4=39.

script.step_note: P1 casts Harmonize. Extort triggers (ControllerCastsSpell). Trigger resolves first: P2/P3/P4 each lose 1 life, P1 gains 3. Then Harmonize resolves: P1 draws 3.

actions.description: Initial: Syndic of Tithes on P1 battlefield, Harmonize in P1 hand, all players at 40 life, stack empty

actions.note: CR 601.2: P1 casts Harmonize ({2GG}). {2GG} paid from pool. CR 603.2: Extort triggered ability (TriggerEvent::ControllerCastsSpell) fires immediately and is flushed to the stack above Harmonize (CR 405.5 LIFO).

actions.description: After cast: Harmonize + Extort trigger on stack (count 2), P1 hand empty
actions.note: CR 603.3: The Extort trigger is flushed to the stack immediately. Stack: Harmonize (bottom, index 0) and Extort trigger (top, index 1) per LIFO (CR 405.5).
CR 116.3: All four players pass priority. Top of stack (Extort trigger) resolves.

resolution.note: CR 702.101a: Extort drain — P2 loses 1 life (40->39).
CR 702.101a: Extort drain — P3 loses 1 life (40->39).
CR 702.101a: Extort drain — P4 loses 1 life (40->39).
CR 702.101a: P1 gains life equal to the total life lost (3 opponents x 1 = 3). P1: 40->43.

actions.note: CR 608.2: Extort triggered ability resolves. Deterministic always-pay fallback executes drain. Each of 3 opponents loses 1 life; P1 gains 3.

actions.description: After Extort resolves: P1 at 43, P2/P3/P4 at 39, Harmonize still on stack
actions.note: Extort drained each opponent for 1 and gave P1 3 life. Harmonize remains on the stack.
CR 116.3: All four players pass priority. Harmonize (top of stack) resolves.

resolution.note: CR 608.2: Harmonize resolves. P1 draws 3 cards (library had Forest, Island, Plains).

actions.note: CR 608.2: Harmonize resolves; P1 draws 3 cards; card moves to P1's graveyard.

actions.description: Final: stack empty, P1 at 43 life with 3 cards in hand, P2/P3/P4 each at 39 life, Harmonize in P1 graveyard
actions.note: Extort drain: each opponent (P2/P3/P4) lost 1 life; P1 gained 3 total. Harmonize drew 3 cards from P1's library. CR 702.101a confirmed: total life lost = 3, P1 gains 3.
